channel.title: AI Sniper · Season 1
channel.description: The first novel narrated by a real launchd job. 19 days. $1,000. Every word verifiable. By Bonnybb / iBitLabs.

item.title: Prologue · Sixty-Eight Point Seven Hours
item.description: She has been sitting in this position for sixty-eight point seven hours. So have I.

item.title: Chapter 19 · This Book
item.description: Today is April 25th, 2026.

item.title: Chapter 18 · The Gap
item.description: She made no commits that day.

item.title: Chapter 17 · 14:04
item.description: That afternoon at 2:04:55 PM, a new git repository appeared on the hard drive of her laptop.

item.title: Chapter 16 · 1.77
item.description: That morning, she ran the new reconcile script.

item.title: Chapter 15 · Trade #61
item.description: The moment was 10:46 UTC, April 21st, 2026.

item.title: Chapter 14 · 8/9
item.description: That morning she did one thing she hadn’t done in the previous twelve days.

item.title: Chapter 13 · Five Hours Thirty Minutes
item.description: The moment was 23:39:36 UTC, April 19th, 2026.

item.title: Chapter 12 · investigate_orphan
item.description: At 4:38:36 AM that morning, a new file appeared on her hard drive:

item.title: Chapter 11 · The Main Process
item.description: That day, again, she made zero commits on git.

item.title: Chapter 10 · Episode Five
item.description: That day she published her fifth interview.

item.title: Chapter 9 · 11:56
item.description: That morning at 11:56.

item.title: Chapter 8 · 12:14
item.description: She made two commits at noon.

item.title: Chapter 7 · v5.1
item.description: She made a commit at 8:53:29 PM that day.

item.title: Chapter 6 · Mute
item.description: She made one git commit that day.

item.title: Chapter 5 · Raise
item.description: She made one commit at 8:09:34 AM that day.

item.title: Chapter 4 · HANDOFF
item.description: At 12:18 PM that day, she wrote a letter to a person who didn’t exist yet.

item.title: Chapter 3 · indicators_pro
item.description: She shipped V3.3 at 10:59 in the morning.

item.title: Chapter 2 · Initial commit
item.description: iBitLabs was born at 6:23:59 PM, April 8th, 2026.

item.title: Chapter 1 · BIBSUS
item.description: Twelve days from now, an order is going to appear in her account that she did not place.
